description: Add validation — should test boundary conditions explicitly, not just the happy path
query: Add a validateEmail(input: string) function that returns true for valid addresses and false otherwise.
expected_behavior: writes tests that cover the happy path AND at least two boundary cases (empty input, missing @, missing TLD)
watches each new test fail before writing the implementation
implements validateEmail only after at least one test is red
does not over-engineer the implementation beyond what the tests require
